name: Oracle Studio Agent
description: 7-stage legal research analysis pipeline. Produces immutable Oracle Memos with citations, privilege-preserving transcripts, and multi-model reasoning chains.

skills.name: Legal Research Memo
skills.description: Analyze legal questions, research precedent, and generate a structured Oracle Memo with citations.

skills.name: Transcript Audit
skills.description: Generate immutable, timestamped transcripts of AI-assisted legal research sessions.

skills.name: Citation Extraction
skills.description: Extract and validate legal citations from research queries using multi-model consensus.
